title: atomwrite case subcommand output
description: Result of `atomwrite case` — converts identifier case style (snake/camel/Pascal/kebab/SCREAMING) in source files.

path.description: Absolute path to the source file.

column.description: 1-based column number of the rewrite start.

rewrites.description: Array of identifier rewrites applied to the file.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the operation in milliseconds.
